since_last: 49% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.59%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 49% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.43% · BTC -3.22% · Gold +0.78% · Nasdaq100 +1.14%. 49% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.59%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.59%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.06%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +16.34%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +16.34%, AVAV +14.85%, MRVL +7.25%, VRT +7.25%, KLAC +6.67%. Laggards: TTD -5.60%, DLR -4.98%, SMR -4.63%, EQIX -3.68%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.64% at $170.16
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.64% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
